title: Retry Safety, Replayability, Backoff, Jitter, and Retry Budgets · Automation and Data Client Systems · Scenario Checkpoint
summary: A production data release board evaluating a changed source contract must defend independent decisions across fresh cases, including one ambiguous failure and one changed boundary for retry safety, replayability, backoff, jitter, and retry budgets, producing bounded retry and replay decision engine. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for a Python 3.14 urllib and HTTP client layers bounded retry and replay decision engine. Learners progress through prediction, explic…
objectives: Classify retry candidates from operation semantics, failure phase, response status, caller budget, and server guidance. Demonstrate the result through Python 3.14 urllib, http.client, ssl, typed protocols, and fixture transports.

Prove request bodies and credential state can be reconstructed before replaying an attempt. Demonstrate the result through Python 3.14 urllib, http.client, ssl, typed protocols, and fixture transports.

Apply capped exponential backoff with an explicit jitter strategy and deterministic test clock. Demonstrate the result through Python 3.14 urllib, http.client, ssl, typed protocols, and fixture transports.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""http-clients-python cumulative safe data-client portfolio.

Browser labs use deterministic request and response models only. Live urllib,
DNS, TLS, sockets, concurrency, and load require local Python 3.14 transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RequestEvidence:
    method: str
    target: str
    attempt: int

@dataclass(frozen=True)
class ResponseEvidence:
    status: int
    body_bytes: int
    valid: bool

print("Python HTTP client portfolio ready")

steps.title: Python Reconstruct the defensible process · Quiz Retryable Classification
steps.instruction:
Order the Retryable Classification Python HTTP evidence cycle for this quiz task before implementing it.
